question.string: After whom is the Riemannian geometry named?
Which animal participated in a military operation with the Australian Defence Force?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT ?animal WHERE {
  ?operation wdt:P31 wd:Q645883 .
  ?operation wdt:P527 ?animal .
  ?operation wdt:P710 wd:Q625657 .
  ?animal wdt:P31 wd:Q16521 .
}

question.string: among the characters in the witcher, who has two unmarried partners, Yennefer of Vengerberg and Triss Merigold?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT ?character WHERE {
  ?character wdt:P451 wd:Q4205826, wd:Q4463198 .
}
GROUP BY ?character
HAVING (COUNT(?character) = 2)

can i play don't starve on play station 4?
How many General Secretaries of the CPSU were there before Leonid Brezhnev?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT (COUNT(?secretary) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?secretary wdt:P39 wd:Q87004793 .
  ?secretary wdt:P31 wd:Q5 .
  ?secretary wdt:P39 ?position .
  ?secretary wdt:P39 wd:Q87004793 .
  FILTER(?secretary != wd:Q765165)
}

question.string: How many different presidents of Russia have there been that took the position after 1990?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?president) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?president wdt:P31 wd:Q5;  # Instance of human
             wdt:P1906 wd:Q105824503;  # Office held by head of state (President of Russia)
             wdt:P571 ?inception.  # Inception date
  FILTER(YEAR(?inception) > 1990)
}

PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

ASK {
  wd:Q860580 wdt:P112 ?founder1, ?founder2 .
  ?founder1 wdt:P69 ?university .

}

question.string: Do all of batman’s partner speak english as native language?
How many spouses do head of states have on average?
Was there at least one Formula 1 event on the AVUS?
Find all Turkish verbs ending with “uş” with their lemma.

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT ?verb ?lemma WHERE {
  ?verb wdt:P31 wd:Q17278755;  # Instance of lemma
        wdt:P225 ?lemma.       # Has lemma
  FILTER(STRENDS(?lemma, "uş")) # Ends with "uş"
}

question.string: From which country are the beagles originally from?
From which country came the 2nd most winners of the Emmy Award ?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT ?country (COUNT(?winner) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?winner wdt:P166 wd:Q66716595;  # Emmy Award
          wdt:P27 ?country.       # Country of citizenship
}
GROUP BY ?country
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 2

How many Japanese writers received the Nobel Prize?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT (COUNT(?writer) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?writer wdt:P31 wd:Q5 ;  # Instance of human
          wdt:P27 wd:Q17 ; # Country of citizenship: Japan
          wdt:P166 wd:Q7191 . # Award received: Nobel Prize
}

question.string: How many languages are widely used in India?
How many different colors can water take?
How many locations has Georges Braque worked at (work location)?
How many months does winter consist of in Germany?
How many movies does the Scream franchise have?
How many movies has James Cameron directed prior to the year 2010?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT (COUNT(?movie) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?movie wdt:P31 wd:Q11424;  # Instance of film
         wdt:P57 wd:Q42574.  # Directed by James Cameron
  ?movie wdt:P577 ?date.     # Publication date
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) < 2010) # Before 2010
}

SELECT (COUNT(?work) AS ?count) WHERE {

  ?work wdt:P31 wd:Q7725634 .

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT (COUNT(?award) AS ?totalOscars) WHERE {
  ?movie wdt:P57 wd:Q55400;  # Movies directed by Hayao Miyazaki
         wdt:P166 wd:Q19020. # Received Oscars
  ?award wdt:P31 wd:Q66796038. # Award instance
}

question.string: How many paintings of Pablo Picasso were ever in a museum?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT (COUNT(?painting) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?painting wdt:P31 wd:Q2500638;  # Instance of painting
           wdt:P170 wd:Q5593;     # Creator is Pablo Picasso
           wdt:P276 ?museum.      # Located in a museum
}

question.string: How many people can play "Mensch ärgere dich nicht" at most?
How many people did Oscar Pistorius kill?
How many people died due to the Great Leap Forward according to the highest estimate?
How many people have won the Nobel Prize in Literature since its inception?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT (COUNT(?person) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P31 wd:Q5 ;  # Instance of human
          wdt:P1346 wd:Q37922 .  # Winner of Nobel Prize in Literature
  ?award wdt:P361 wd:Q37922 ;  # Part of Nobel Prize in Literature
         wdt:P571 ?date .  # Inception date
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) >= 1901)  # Nobel Prize in Literature inception year
}
